entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The crop species being studied for yield and adaptability.

entities.name: DRY DIRECT SEEDED RICE
entities.description: A cultivation system where rice is sown directly into dry soil.

entities.name: PUDDLED TRANSPLANTED SYSTEM
entities.description: A traditional rice cultivation system involving puddling and transplanting.

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION STUDY
entities.description: A method used to identify genomic regions associated with specific traits.

entities.name: ROOTS AND NUTRIENT UPTAKE
entities.description: Traits related to root development and the absorption of nutrients.

entities.name: PLANT-MORPHOLOGICAL TRAITS
entities.description: Traits describing the physical form and structure of the plant.

entities.name: LODGING-RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to resist falling over.

entities.name: YIELD AND YIELD ATTRIBUTING TRAITS
entities.description: Traits that directly or indirectly contribute to the final grain yield.

entities.name: MARKER-TRAIT ASSOCIATIONS
entities.description: The statistical link between a genetic marker and a phenotypic trait.

entities.name: ADAPTABILITY
entities.description: The capacity of rice to adjust to the dry direct seeded cultivation environment.

entities.name: SNPS
entities.description: Single Nucleotide Polymorphisms used as genetic markers in the association study.

entities.name: NODAL ROOT
entities.description: A specific type of root emerging from the nodes of the stem.

entities.name: ROOT HAIR LENGTH
entities.description: The length of the root hairs, affecting nutrient uptake.

entities.name: ROOT LENGTH DENSITY
entities.description: The total length of roots per unit volume of soil.

entities.name: STEM AND CULM DIAMETER
entities.description: The thickness of the plant stem and culm.

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical measurement of the plant.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area.

entities.name: CANDIDATE GENE
entities.description: Genes suspected to be responsible for the observed traits.

entities.name: SEEDLING ESTABLISHMENT TRAITS
entities.description: Traits that influence the successful early growth of the seedling.

entities.name: GENOMICS ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach that uses genomic information to select for desired traits.
